title: Block
subtitle: An anonymous function (method or block) that captures messages and arguments. Activated by sending it a message.

members.name: Formatter
members.description: Helper object for the <tt>asString</tt> method.

members.name: argumentNames
members.description: Returns a List of strings containing the argument names of the receiver.

members.name: asSimpleString
members.description: Returns a short description of the receiver.

members.name: asString
members.description: Returns a full description of the receiver with decompiled code.

members.name: call
members.description: Activates the receiver with the provided arguments.

members.name: callWithArgList
members.description: Activates the block with the given argument list.

members.name: code
members.description: Returns a string containing the decompiled code of the receiver.

members.name: justSerialized
members.description: Writes the receiver's code into the stream.

members.name: message
members.description: Returns the root message of the receiver.

members.name: passStops
members.description: Returns whether or not the receiver passes return/continue/break to caller.

members.name: performOn
members.description:
optionalSlotContext) Activates the receiver in the target context of
    anObject. Returns the result.

members.name: print
members.description: Prints an Io source code representation of the block/method.

members.name: println
members.description: Same as <tt>print</tt>.

members.name: profilerTime
members.description: Returns clock() time spent in compiler in seconds.

members.name: scope
members.description:
Returns the scope used when the block is activated or
    Nil if the target of the message is the scope.

members.name: setArgumentNames
members.description:
Sets the receiver's argument names to those specified in
    aListOfStrings. Returns self.

members.name: setCode
members.description: Sets the receiver's message to a compiled version of aString. Returns self.

members.name: setMessage
members.description: Sets the root message of the receiver to aMessage.

members.name: setPassStops
members.description: Sets whether the receiver passes return/continue/break to caller.

members.name: setProfilerOn
members.description:
If aBool is true, the global block profiler is enabled, if false it is
    disabled. Returns self.

members.name: setScope
members.description:
If argument is an object, when the block is activated,
    it will set the proto and self slots of its locals to the specified
    object. If Nil, it will set them to the target of the message.
